title: Yuki's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Yuki plays peek-a-boo with her favorite toys and stuffed animals as she gets ready for bed, creating a gentle and interactive bedtime routine.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, Yuki! Where are you? Behind the soft blue curtain by your bed!

illustration.description: A little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes hiding behind a soft blue curtain next to a cozy bed, with only her feet visible underneath
illustration.alt: Yuki hiding behind a blue curtain with her feet showing

pages.text: There you are! Now where is your teddy bear? Is he hiding under the pillow?

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes lifting a fluffy white pillow to reveal a brown teddy bear underneath on her bed
illustration.alt: Yuki finding her teddy bear under a pillow

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, teddy! Where is bunny? Look behind the lamp!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes peeking behind a small bedside lamp where a white stuffed bunny is partially hidden
illustration.alt: Yuki discovering her bunny behind a lamp

pages.text: Found you, bunny! Now all friends are here. Time for sleepy peek-a-boo under the covers!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes tucked in bed with her teddy bear and bunny, with a cozy blanket pulled up to her chin, creating a peek-a-boo moment
illustration.alt: Yuki snuggled in bed with her stuffed animals under covers

pages.text: Good night, Yuki. Sweet dreams with teddy and bunny. Peek-a-boo tomorrow!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes sleeping peacefully with her eyes closed, cuddling her teddy bear and bunny in a dimly lit bedroom
illustration.alt: Yuki sleeping peacefully with her stuffed animals

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Where was Yuki hiding at the beginning?
questions.explanation: Yuki was hiding behind the soft blue curtain by her bed!

questions.question: Where did Yuki find her teddy bear?
questions.explanation: The teddy bear was hiding under the fluffy white pillow on Yuki's bed!

questions.question: What did Yuki do at the end?
questions.explanation: Yuki went to sleep with her teddy bear and bunny for sweet dreams!
